name: categories_processing_workflow
description: Workflow to process categories by adding a timestamp and scheduling a supplementary data fetch.

transitions.name: add_timestamp
transitions.description: Append a UTC timestamp to mark processing time.
transitions.end_state_description: Entity now has a processed timestamp.

externalized_processors.name: process_add_timestamp
externalized_processors.description: Process function to add a timestamp to the entity.

transitions.name: schedule_supplementary_fetch
transitions.description: Schedule the asynchronous supplementary data fetch.
transitions.end_state_description: Supplementary fetch task has been scheduled.

externalized_processors.name: process_fetch_supplementary
externalized_processors.description: Process function to asynchronously fetch supplementary data.
